description: Green backpack with piping and branding on the front An external zipped pocket in the front and two mesh pockets on the sides Two main zippered compartments with a slip pockets and an organise sleeve inside in the first compartment and a padded separator and a padded laptop compartment with velcro closure in the second back compartment Haul loop and a soft padded handle for handling ease and a headphone slot with elasticated opening on top Padded, adjustable shoulder straps with mesh lining that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries Cushioned contrast mesh panel at the back for added comfort and breathability Warranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
